name: Selyodka Pod Ukropnym Sousom
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the red wine vinegar, olive oil, sugar, and dried dill (or fresh dill) together in a bowl until well combined.
2. Place the herring fillets into a deep dish or serving container.
3. Pour the dressing mixture over the herring, ensuring it is evenly coated.
4. Refrigerate for 4-6 hours to allow the flavors to meld and the fish to absorb the sauce.
